name: device

outputs.description: Risk score of the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.notableDomainCount.value Number of suspicious domains accessed by the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceScore

outputs.description: Percentile of the specified device for notable domains accessed AwakeSecurity.Devices.notableDomainCount.weight Importance given to the suspicious domains when calculating the specified device risk score
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.notableDomainCount.percentile

outputs.description: Number of suspicious IOCs associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.iocCount.percentile Percentile of the specified device for notable IOCs
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.iocCount.value

outputs.description: Importance given to the IOCs when calculating the specified device risk score AwakeSecurity.Devices.watchlistCount.value Total number of current threat behaviors associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.iocCount.weight

outputs.description: How this device compares to other devices for number of threat behaviors AwakeSecurity.Devices.watchlistCount.weight Importance given to the threat behaviors when calculating the specified device risk score
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.watchlistCount.percentile

outputs.description: Number of characteristic artifacts associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.activityCount.percentile How this device compares to other devices for characteristic artifacts
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.activityCount.value

outputs.description: Importance given to the characteristic artifacts when calculating the specified device risk score AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceName Device name
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.activityCount.weight

outputs.description: Device type AwakeSecurity.Devices.os Operating system associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceType

outputs.description: Most recent IP address associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.activeIp Most common IP address associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.recentIp

outputs.description: Most common email address associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.commonUsername Most common username associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.commonEmail

outputs.description: Most common monitoring point ID the specified device was seen on AwakeSecurity.Devices.nSimilarDevices Number of devices that are similar to the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.commonMpid

outputs.description: Tags applied to the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.ipCount Number of IP addresses associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.tags

outputs.description: Number of email addresses associated with this device AwakeSecurity.Devices.usernameCount Number of usernames associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.emailCount

outputs.description: Number of applications associated with the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.mpids List of monitoring point IDs associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.applicationCount

outputs.description: Number of time this protocol was used by the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.firstSeen Date that the specified device was first seen
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.protocols.count

outputs.description: Date that the specified device was last seen AwakeSecurity.Devices.osVersion Operating system version of the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.lastSeen

outputs.description: Awake Security unique identifier for the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.ips List of IP addresses associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.deviceGuid

outputs.description: List of usernames that were inferred as accounts on the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.emails List of email addresses associated with the specified device
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.usernames

outputs.description: Date of the last TCP session acknowledgment of the specified device AwakeSecurity.Devices.whiteListed bool
outputs.name: AwakeSecurity.Devices.ackTs

outputs.description: AwakeSecurity.Devices.protocols.name Type of protocol used by the specified device
outputs.name: Is the device associated with the specified email address in the allow list
